title: Open AU Info Page From Ambiguous Click Here Link
goal: From the inaccessible AU home page, choose the correct repeated "click here" link that opens the Info page and stop there.
instruction: On the inaccessible AU home page, choose the correct "click here" link that opens the Info page and stop when it loads.
review_notes: Accessibility-first disambiguation task using repeated uninformative link text on the inaccessible AU page.

steps.explanation: I chose the first repeated "click here" link because it opens the page that lists the accessibility issues.

action.summary: I opened the Accessible University Info page from the ambiguous link set and stopped there.

steps.explanation: The requested information page is open now, so I am ending the task.
